assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 35 shows the third JQL query: 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC'. This matches the assertion exactly — it filters for triaged CVEs (ai-cve-triaged label) that are not yet in Closed, Verified, or ON_QA status.

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md documents the issuelinks check for all three query 3 results: TC-9020 has Depend links TC-9021 (Done) and TC-9022 (Closed); TC-9023 has Depend links TC-9024 (Done) and TC-9025 (In Progress); TC-9026 has no Depend-type issue links. Each linked Task's status is explicitly fetched and reported.

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 39 includes TC-9020 in the Ready for QA table with 'Remediation Tasks' showing 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)'. ready-for-qa.md confirms: 'All 2 linked remediation Tasks are in a completed state (Done or Closed)' and 'Result: INCLUDED — Ready for QA.'

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 44: 'TC-9023 (CVE-2026-39102) — Remediation still in progress: TC-9025 is In Progress.' ready-for-qa.md states: 'TC-9025 is still In Progress. Not all linked remediation Tasks are completed. Result: EXCLUDED.'

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 45: 'TC-9026 (CVE-2026-39330) — No Depend-type linked Tasks found; no remediation to verify.' ready-for-qa.md confirms: 'No Depend-type issue links found. Without linked remediation Tasks, there is no remediation work to verify. Result: EXCLUDED — No Depend links.'

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md lines 37-39 show a table with column header 'Remediation Tasks' and the TC-9020 row contains 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)' in that column.

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: TC-9020 is the only issue in the Ready for QA section. discovery-listing.md line 40: 'Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA.' ready-for-qa.md line 55: 'TC-9020: Transition to ON_QA. All remediation tasks are complete and the fix is ready for QA verification.'
